title: Build a Video Display Using iframe
description: A YouTube video embedded in a webpage using the iframe element. The exercise covers the key iframe attributes needed for a proper embedded video experience: width and height for sizing, src for the video URL, allow for browser feature permissions, referrerpolicy for privacy control, and allowfullscreen so users can go full screen.
objectives: Use the iframe element to embed external content
Set width and height to size the iframe
Point src to a YouTube embed URL
Use the allow attribute to grant browser feature permissions
Add referrerpolicy and allowfullscreen for security and UX

files.name: index.html
files.content: iframe Video Display
